name: Bell
desc: The classic gold bell emoji representing Christmas bells, church chimes, and holiday caroling. It is the primary symbol for festive alerts and the musical sounds of the winter season.

name: Bell with Slash
desc: Often used to represent 'Silent Night' or the quiet, peaceful moments of Christmas Eve. It symbolizes a break from holiday noise and a focus on tranquility.

name: Bellhop Bell
desc: Perfect for SEO content related to winter travel, holiday hotel stays, and Christmas service hospitality. It represents the busy season for hospitality and guest greetings.

name: Mrs. Claus
desc: Commonly paired with the bell emoji to depict holiday cheer and the ringing of dinner bells for festive Christmas feasts.

name: Deer
desc: Used in conjunction with bells to evoke the image of reindeer and the iconic sound of sleigh bells jingling through the snow on Christmas Eve.

name: Musical Notes
desc: The essential companion to the bell emoji when referencing 'Jingle Bells' or other famous Christmas carols and holiday music playlists.

name: Church
desc: Represents the traditional ringing of bells for Christmas morning services and midnight mass, capturing the spiritual essence of the holiday.

name: Wedding
desc: Symbolizing 'wedding bells' for festive winter marriages and holiday-themed ceremonies. Perfect for seasonal bridal and wedding planning content.

name: Musical Note
desc: Represents the single tone of a handbell or a festive chime, often used in posts about holiday school concerts and handbell choir performances.

name: Loudspeaker
desc: Used to represent the 'ringing in' of holiday sales, Christmas announcements, and major festive news across social media platforms.
